# EasyFreeResume

> A 100% free resume and CV builder with ATS-optimized templates. No paywall, no sign-up, no watermarks — your data stays in your browser and exports instantly to PDF or DOCX.

## Key Facts
- 100% free: every feature, forever — no paywall, no trial limits, no hidden fees
- No sign-up: no account required; data stays in your browser (private by default)
- ATS-friendly: single-column templates that parse cleanly in Applicant Tracking Systems
- Instant export: download finished resumes as PDF or DOCX in one click
- URL: https://easyfreeresume.com

## Resume & CV Builder
- [Free Resume Builder (no sign-up)](https://easyfreeresume.com/free-resume-builder-no-sign-up): Build a resume with no account required
- [Resume Templates](https://easyfreeresume.com/templates): Browse all resume templates
- [ATS-Friendly Templates](https://easyfreeresume.com/ats-resume-templates): Templates optimized for Applicant Tracking Systems
- [CV Templates](https://easyfreeresume.com/cv-templates): CV templates for UK/AU/NZ
- [Free CV Builder (no sign-up)](https://easyfreeresume.com/free-cv-builder-no-sign-up)
- [Home](https://easyfreeresume.com/): Free online resume builder

- [Keywords Hub](https://easyfreeresume.com/resume-keywords): ATS keyword lists for 25+ job titles
